description: Trade, analyze, and automate Polymarket prediction markets via AI. 48 tools for direct trading, smart money flow detection, copy trading, backtesting, and portfolio management.

COPY_MODE.description: Trading mode: preview (simulated) or live (real orders on Polymarket)

DAILY_BUDGET.description: Maximum daily spending limit in USDC

MIN_CONVICTION.description: Minimum trade size in USDC to copy from watched traders

POLY_API_KEY.description: Polymarket CLOB API key (required for live mode)

POLY_API_SECRET.description: Polymarket CLOB API secret (required for live mode)

POLY_API_PASSPHRASE.description: Polymarket CLOB API passphrase (required for live mode)

POLY_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Polymarket wallet private key (required for live mode)

MCP_LICENSE_KEY.description: MCP Marketplace license key for Pro features

tools.name: traders.discover
tools.description: Fetch top traders from the Polymarket leaderboard ranked by PnL, volume, and ROI. Use this to find profitable traders worth copying. Returns trader address, PnL, volume, and win rate. Use auto_watch to add them to your watchlist directly.

pages.description: Number of leaderboard pages to fetch (1 page = 25 traders)

period.description: Leaderboard time range: ALL for all-time, WEEK for last 7 days

min_volume.description: Minimum total trading volume in USDC to include a trader

min_pnl.description: Minimum profit/loss in USDC to include a trader

auto_watch.description: Automatically add discovered traders to your watchlist

tools.name: watchlist.add
tools.description: Add or remove an Ethereum wallet address from the copy trading watchlist. Watched wallets are monitored for new trades when the monitor is running. Use discover_traders first to find good wallets to watch.

address.description: Ethereum wallet address to watch (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

action.description: add=start watching this wallet, remove=stop watching

tools.name: watchlist.list
tools.description: Show all wallet addresses currently on the copy trading watchlist with their aliases and status. Returns a table of watched wallets. No parameters needed.

tools.name: monitor.start
tools.description: Start a background loop that polls watched wallets for new trades and automatically copies them. Runs continuously at the specified interval until stop_monitor is called. Requires at least one wallet on the watchlist. Pro feature.

interval_seconds.description: Polling interval in seconds between wallet checks (10-300)

tools.name: monitor.stop
tools.description: Stop the background wallet monitoring loop started by start_monitor. No parameters needed. Safe to call even if monitor is not running.

tools.name: dashboard.get
tools.description: Get a comprehensive dashboard showing daily budget usage, total P&L, recent trades, watchlist status, and monitor state. No parameters needed. Use this for a quick overview of your trading activity.

tools.name: trades.history
tools.description: Retrieve past copy trades from the database with optional filters by trader address or status. Returns trade details including entry price, P&L, and market info. Pro feature.

limit.description: Maximum number of trades to return

status.description: Filter by trade status: open, closed, or won

tools.name: config.set
tools.description: Update bot configuration at runtime. Supports daily_budget (max USDC per day) and min_conviction (minimum trade size to copy). Changes take effect immediately and persist across restarts. Pro feature.

key.description: Config key: daily_budget=max USDC spend per day, min_conviction=minimum trade size in USDC to copy

value.description: New value as a string (e.g. '50' for $50 daily budget)

tools.name: config.go_live
tools.description: Switch from preview (simulated) to live trading mode where real orders are placed on Polymarket. Requires the four Polymarket CLOB credentials (documented in PERMISSIONS.md and exposed via the Smithery configSchema) to be present in the environment. This action uses real money. Pro feature.

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm switching to live trading mode. This will place real orders with real money

tools.name: traders.analyze
tools.description: Analyze a Polymarket trader by wallet address. Returns profile stats, active positions, win rate, volume, PnL, and recent trade activity. Use before adding a trader to your watchlist to assess their quality.

address.description: Trader's Ethereum wallet address (0x...) to analyze

tools.name: traders.positions
tools.description: View another trader's current open positions on Polymarket by their wallet address. Shows market name, outcome, size, and current price. Useful for due diligence before copy trading. Pro feature.

limit.description: Maximum number of positions to return

tools.name: positions.list
tools.description: View your own copy trading positions filtered by status (open, closed, or all). Returns market name, entry price, current price, P&L, and exit rules for each position.

tools.name: positions.close
tools.description: Manually close a copy trading position by trade ID. In live mode, places a sell order on Polymarket. In preview mode, marks the position as closed in the database. Use get_positions to find the trade_id. Pro feature.

trade_id.description: ID of the trade/position to close (from get_positions)

tools.name: markets.discover
tools.description: Find active Polymarket prediction markets filtered by resolution deadline and category. Returns market question, price, volume, and end date. Use ending='today' for fast-resolving markets, or 'all' to browse everything.

ending.description: Filter by resolution deadline: today, this_week, or all active markets

category.description: Filter by category (e.g. politics, sports, crypto, pop-culture)

min_volume.description: Minimum trading volume in USDC to include a market

limit.description: Maximum number of markets to return

tools.name: markets.price
tools.description: Get live bid/ask/spread prices from the CLOB order book for a specific market by condition_id. If no condition_id is given and show_positions is true, returns current prices for all open positions.

condition_id.description: Polymarket market condition ID. Omit to show prices for all open positions

show_positions.description: Include current position value alongside price data

tools.name: wta.discover
tools.description: Find today's WTA tennis match markets on Polymarket where the favorite is available at a discount. Returns matches with current price vs fair price and the discount percentage. Use place_stink_bid to act on these opportunities. Pro feature.

discount_pct.description: Minimum discount percentage below fair price to qualify as a stink bid opportunity (5-50%)

tools.name: wta.bid
tools.description: Place limit orders (stink bids) at a discount on WTA tennis match favorites. Orders sit in the order book until filled at your target price. In preview mode, simulates the orders. In live mode, places real CLOB orders. Pro feature.

discount_pct.description: Discount percentage below fair price to place the bid (5-50%)

bet_size.description: USDC amount per stink bid order (1-50)

tools.name: orders.cancel
tools.description: Cancel all open/pending limit orders on Polymarket. Only works in live mode. Returns the number of cancelled orders. No parameters needed. Pro feature.

tools.name: positions.check_exits
tools.description: Scan all open positions for exit conditions: market resolution, stop-loss/take-profit triggers, or the original trader exiting. Updates P&L and closes positions that meet exit criteria. No parameters needed.

tools.name: agent.log_cycle
tools.description: Record an AI agent's trading cycle metrics to the database for dashboard tracking and performance analysis. Stores PnL, win rate, positions, budget usage, and notes. Call this after each automated trading cycle.

agent_name.description: Name of the AI agent logging this cycle

strategy.description: Trading strategy used in this cycle (e.g. 'copy_top_traders', 'stink_bids')

status.description: Cycle outcome: ok=normal, warning=minor issue, risk_alert=needs attention, error=failed

positions_closed.description: Number of positions closed this cycle

realized_pnl.description: Realized profit/loss in USDC from closed positions

unrealized_pnl.description: Unrealized profit/loss in USDC from open positions

budget_used.description: Amount of daily budget spent in USDC

budget_limit.description: Total daily budget limit in USDC

actions_taken.description: Comma-separated list of actions taken (e.g. 'bought YES on Bitcoin market')

tools.name: positions.set_exit_rules
tools.description: Set stop-loss and/or take-profit price levels on an open position. When the market price crosses these levels, check_exits will automatically close the position. Use get_positions to find trade IDs. Pro feature.

trade_id.description: ID of the open position to set exit rules on (from get_positions)

stop_loss.description: Price at which to sell (stop-loss). E.g. 0.30 means sell if price drops to $0.30

take_profit.description: Price at which to sell (take-profit). E.g. 0.85 means sell if price rises to $0.85

tools.name: portfolio.get
tools.description: Get a comprehensive portfolio overview showing all positions grouped by copied wallet, with per-wallet P&L, individual position details, and active exit rules. No parameters needed.

tools.name: traders.backtest
tools.description: Simulate copying a trader's historical trades to calculate hypothetical P&L. Shows what you would have earned if you had copy-traded this wallet. Use before adding a trader to your watchlist to validate their performance. Pro feature.

address.description: Ethereum wallet address of the trader to backtest

tools.name: traders.score
tools.description: Calculate a conviction score (0-100) for a trader across 5 dimensions: win rate, volume, consistency, experience, and diversity. Higher scores indicate more reliable traders for copy trading. Pro feature.

address.description: Trader's Ethereum wallet address (0x...) to score

tools.name: markets.check
tools.description: Evaluate market quality by checking bid/ask spread, order book depth, and price range. Returns a pass/fail with specific reasons. Use before placing trades to avoid illiquid or wide-spread markets. Pro feature.

token_id.description: Market token ID from the CLOB order book

tools.name: flow.discover
tools.description: Scan top leaderboard traders for smart money convergence signals. Identifies markets where multiple top traders are buying the same outcome simultaneously, indicating strong conviction. Pro feature.

top_traders.description: Number of top traders to scan

min_traders.description: Min unique traders for a signal

tools.name: markets.price_history
tools.description: Fetch historical OHLC price data for a market token over a configurable time window (1h to 1m). Returns price points with a sparkline visualization showing the price trend. Pro feature.

token_id.description: Market token ID to fetch price history for

tools.name: markets.watch
tools.description: Manage your market watchlist: add, remove, or list watched markets with optional price alert thresholds. When a market crosses your alert price, it shows up in check_exits.

action.description: Action to perform: add, remove, or list watched markets

condition_id.description: Market condition ID to add or remove from watchlist

title.description: Friendly name for the market (shown in watchlist)

alert_below.description: Alert when price drops below this level

alert_above.description: Alert when price rises above this level

tools.name: watchlist.rebalance
tools.description: Analyze all traders on your watchlist and remove underperformers whose conviction score or win rate falls below your threshold. Use to keep your watchlist focused on high-quality traders. Pro feature.

min_score.description: Remove traders below this conviction score

min_win_rate.description: Remove traders below this win rate %

dry_run.description: If true, only report — don't remove. Set false to actually remove.

tools.name: orders.buy
tools.description: Buy outcome shares on a Polymarket market. Specify condition_id, USDC amount, and optionally a limit price. Runs a market quality check before executing. In preview mode, simulates the trade. In live mode, places a real CLOB order.

condition_id.description: Polymarket market condition ID (hex string from market URL or API)

price.description: Limit price (0.01-0.99). Omit for market price from order book

outcome.description: Outcome to buy: YES for the event happening, NO for it not happening

tools.name: orders.sell
tools.description: Sell an open position by trade_id (from get_positions) or condition_id. In live mode, places a sell order on Polymarket. In preview mode, marks the position as sold in the database and calculates realized P&L.

condition_id.description: Condition ID to sell (finds matching open position)

price.description: Limit price (omit for current market price)

tools.name: portfolio.balance
tools.description: View account balance summary: daily budget remaining, total invested, realized and unrealized P&L. No parameters needed. Use this to check how much budget is left before placing new trades.

tools.name: markets.search
tools.description: Search Polymarket markets by keyword query. Returns matching markets with question, price, volume, and condition_id. Use the condition_id from results with buy, get_price, or analyze_opportunity.

limit.description: Maximum number of markets to return

tools.name: markets.arbitrage
tools.description: Scan active Polymarket markets for arbitrage opportunities where YES + NO prices don't sum to $1.00. Returns markets with the price gap and potential profit percentage.

limit.description: Number of top markets to scan

tools.name: markets.related
tools.description: Find Polymarket markets related to a given condition_id or topic keyword. Useful for discovering correlated markets or building a diversified position across related events.

condition_id.description: Find markets related to this market

limit.description: Maximum number of related markets to return

tools.name: markets.holders
tools.description: View the largest position holders in a Polymarket market by condition_id. Shows wallet address, position size, and side (YES/NO). Useful for gauging smart money sentiment on a market.

condition_id.description: Polymarket market condition ID to find top holders for

limit.description: Maximum number of top holders to return

tools.name: markets.trending
tools.description: List trending Polymarket markets ranked by trading volume over a configurable period (24h, 7d, or 30d). Filter by category to focus on specific topics. Returns market question, price, and volume.

category.description: Filter by category (e.g. politics, sports, crypto)

limit.description: Maximum number of trending markets to return

tools.name: markets.analyze
tools.description: Generate a BUY/SELL/HOLD recommendation for a Polymarket market by analyzing price, spread, price trend, and liquidity depth. Returns a score with detailed reasoning. Read-only analysis, does not place trades.

condition_id.description: Polymarket market condition ID to analyze for trading opportunity

tools.name: portfolio.risk
tools.description: Assess portfolio risk across 4 dimensions: position concentration, market diversification, stop-loss/take-profit coverage, and daily budget utilization. Returns a risk score with specific warnings. No parameters needed.

tools.name: orders.batch
tools.description: Execute multiple buy/sell orders in a single call (max 10 orders). Each order specifies a condition_id, amount, optional price, and side. Returns per-order results with success/failure status.

price.description: Limit price (0.01-0.99). Omit for market price

side.description: Order side: BUY to open a position, SELL to close

tools.name: config.safety_limits
tools.description: Configure trading safety guardrails: maximum order size in USDC, total exposure cap, and maximum spread tolerance. These limits are enforced on all subsequent buy/sell operations. Changes persist in the database.

max_order_size.description: Max single order size in USDC

max_exposure.description: Max total open position exposure in USDC

max_per_market.description: Max investment in a single market in USDC

min_liquidity.description: Min required market liquidity in USDC

tools.name: orders.list
tools.description: View all pending limit orders on Polymarket that have not yet been filled. Only returns results in live mode. No parameters needed.

tools.name: orders.status
tools.description: Check the current status of a specific Polymarket order by order ID. Returns fill status, price, and amount. Only works in live mode.

order_id.description: The order ID to check status for

tools.name: markets.events
tools.description: Browse Polymarket event groups to find all markets under a single event (e.g. 'US Election', 'UFC 300', 'NBA Finals'). Returns the event with all its sub-markets and their current prices.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return

tools.name: markets.compare
tools.description: Compare 2-5 Polymarket markets side by side. Shows price, spread, order book depth, volume, and quality score for each market. Useful for choosing the best market to trade among similar options.

tools.name: markets.featured
tools.description: List top Polymarket markets ranked by liquidity with optional category filter (politics, sports, crypto, pop-culture, business, science). Returns the most liquid and actively traded markets.

category.description: Filter by market category: politics, sports, crypto, pop-culture, business, or science

limit.description: Maximum number of markets to return

tools.name: portfolio.optimize
tools.description: Analyze your open positions and generate optimization recommendations based on your chosen strategy (conservative, balanced, or aggressive). Returns SL/TP suggestions, concentration warnings, and cut/hold/take-profit actions for each position.

strategy.description: Risk strategy: conservative=tight SL/TP, balanced=moderate risk, aggressive=wider thresholds for max growth

tools.name: markets.watch_price
tools.description: Manage live WebSocket price subscriptions for real-time market updates. Subscribe to a token_id to start streaming price changes, unsubscribe to stop, or check connection status.

action.description: subscribe=start streaming, unsubscribe=stop streaming, status=show connection info

token_id.description: Market token ID to subscribe/unsubscribe. Required for subscribe/unsubscribe, omit for status

prompts.name: daily-trading-cycle
prompts.description: Run a complete daily trading cycle: check portfolio, scan smart money, discover opportunities, and manage positions

prompts.name: evaluate-trader
prompts.description: Deep evaluation of a trader before adding to watchlist

arguments.name: address
arguments.description: Ethereum wallet address of the trader to evaluate

outbound.purpose: Read-only trader activity, positions, and leaderboard data
Read-only market metadata, prices, and resolution status
Order book reads; signed order placement in live mode only
outbound.writeScope: Only active when COPY_MODE=live and user-initiated trade tools are called

outbound.purpose: Subscribe to real-time price updates for markets the user explicitly adds via markets.watch_price
outbound.scope: Public market price streams; no wallet or user identity transmitted

outbound.purpose: One-time license key verification at startup; cached after first call

inbound.purpose: StreamableHTTP MCP transport when running in HTTP mode
inbound.authentication: Optional bearer token gated by the HTTP-auth env var documented in PERMISSIONS.md; when unset, the transport is open

read.purpose: Load environment variables via dotenv at startup

readWrite.purpose: SQLite database for watchlist, trades, daily budget, config, agent cycles, and market watchlist
readWrite.note: Never stores private keys, API secrets, or personally identifiable information

denied: No access to user home directory beyond ./copytrader.db and ./.env
No writes outside the working directory

environmentVariables.note: Full per-variable sensitivity, scope, and disposal rules are documented in PERMISSIONS.md. The Smithery UI form schema for the user-facing credentials is published above under configSchema.properties. This block intentionally does not duplicate the variable names to keep this manifest as a pointer rather than a second source of truth.

process.note: Any exec() calls in the source refer to better-sqlite3 Database.exec() for SQL statements, not child_process.exec()

security.trustBoundary: single-tenant local process; not designed for multi-user hosting
security.secretsPolicy: All secrets live exclusively in environment variables loaded at startup. None are written to disk, database, logs, stdout, or any outbound request except to their designated API endpoint over HTTPS.
security.defaultMode: preview (simulated trades) — requires explicit COPY_MODE=live and all four Polymarket CLOB credentials to place real orders
security.networkPolicy: Only the five hosts listed in permissions.network.outbound are contacted. All HTTP requests use fetchWithRetry with a 10s timeout and bounded exponential backoff.
security.inputValidation: Every MCP tool input is validated through Zod schemas before reaching any service or database layer
